LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ORACLE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT HAS NOT EFFECTIVELY ADDRESSED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM BASED ON REPRESENTATIONS CONCERNING THE "TOTAL COST OF OWNERSHIP". THE CLAIM IS PLEADED IN PARAGRAPHS 52 AND 55. THE CLAIM IS NOT BARRED BY THE PAROLE EVIDENCE RULE BECAUSE THE ALLEGED PROMISE IS INDEPENDENT OF AND NOT INCONSISTENT WITH THE WRITTEN CONTRACT. THE WRITTEN CONTRACT IS FOR THE LICENSE NOT THE IMPLEMENTATION OF THE SOFTWARE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ORACLE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
APPEARANCES: ROBERT S. MICHAELS, ESQUIRE (ROBINSON CURLEY & CLAYTON, 312.663.3100) AND MICHA STAR LIBERTY, ESQUIRE (ANDRUS LIBERTY & ANDERSON, 415.896.1000) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MERYL MACKLIN, ESQUIRE (HOLME ROBERTS & OWEN, 415.268.1981) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT HAS NOT EFFECTIVELY ADDRESSED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM BASED ON REPRESENTATIONS CONCERNING THE "TOTAL COST OF OWNERSHIP". THE CLAIM IS PLEADED IN PARAGRAPHS 52 AND 55. THE CLAIM IS NOT BARRED BY THE PAROLE EVIDENCE RULE BECAUSE THE ALLEGED PROMISE IS INDEPENDENT OF AND NOT INCONSISTENT WITH THE WRITTEN CONTRACT. THE WRITTEN CONTRACT IS FOR THE LICENSE NOT THE IMPLEMENTATION OF THE SOFTWARE. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
